infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Security Job uses the microphone when you tap the mic button so you can register by speaking.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Security Job converts your spoken answers into text for job registration.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Security Job needs the camera so you can take a selfie for registration.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Security Job needs photo access so you can upload your registration photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Security Job needs photo access for your registration photo.
plugins.cameraPermission: Security Job needs the camera for your registration selfie.
